title: Banner Venue Placeholder Removal
objective: Simplify the homepage banner logistics line so it shows only the confirmed date on the first line and keeps 'Conference on Robot Learning' on the second line.
instructions: Edit index.html so the banner first line reads 'November 9, 2026' and no longer includes 'and venue to be announced'.
Keep the second line as 'Conference on Robot Learning'.
constraints: Do not change any other homepage copy unless required for this exact banner text fix.
definition_of_done: The banner shows 'November 9, 2026' on the first line and 'Conference on Robot Learning' on the second line with no venue placeholder wording.
